title: polygala glaucoides var. hirsutula
intro: Polygala glaucoides var. hirsutula, also known as Yin Chiao Mai Men Dong in traditional Chinese medicine, is a plant species belonging to the milkwort family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Polygala glaucoides var. hirsutula include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Polygala glaucoides var. hirsutula is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
